LanguageData.VV_Command_CollectScentDesc: Select a flower to record its scent. {0} slots remain.
LanguageData.VV_Command_SprayPerfumeDesc: Scatter perfume powder over all near flesh creatures. {1} uses remain.
LanguageData.VV_Command_ReloadPerfumeBottleDesc: Spend {0} {1} to prepare the empty bottle for another blend.
LanguageData.VV_Perfume_NoArcaneEffect: Ordinary flowers add a pleasant fragrance but no arcane effect.
LanguageData.VV_Perfume_CannotCollectState: This perfume bottle cannot collect another scent in its current state.
LanguageData.VV_Perfume_MustBeWorn: The perfume bottle must be worn to use it.
LanguageData.VV_Perfume_InvalidFlower: This target does not have a scent that the bottle can record.
LanguageData.VV_Perfume_FlowerTooYoung: This flower must reach 70% growth before its scent can be collected.
LanguageData.VV_Perfume_FlowerUnreachable: The flower is forbidden, reserved, or unreachable.
LanguageData.VV_PerfumeEffect_EmberBloom: The weight-scaled base effect applies -20°C to minimum comfortable temperature. At flower weight 1, fixed bonuses activate: immunity gain speed +0.2 and pain shock threshold +0.1. These fixed bonuses do not grow with higher weight.
LanguageData.VV_PerfumeEffect_FrostBloom: The weight-scaled base effect applies +20°C to maximum comfortable temperature. At flower weight 1, a fixed rest fall rate x0.8 bonus activates. This fixed bonus does not grow with higher weight.
LanguageData.VV_PerfumeEffect_Shockerbud: The weight-scaled base effect grants melee dodge chance +10 and melee hit chance +4. At flower weight 1, a fixed Manipulation capacity x1.1 bonus activates. This fixed bonus does not grow with higher weight.
LanguageData.VV_PerfumeEffect_Thunderpetals: The weight-scaled base effect grants shooting accuracy +8 and ranged cooldown offset -0.1. At flower weight 1, a fixed Consciousness capacity x1.1 bonus activates. This fixed bonus does not grow with higher weight.
LanguageData.VV_PerfumeEffect_Waterdrops: The weight-scaled base effect grants toxic resistance +1.0. At flower weight 1, fixed bonuses activate: flammability x0 and Flame and Burn damage x0. These fixed bonuses do not grow with higher weight.
LanguageData.VV_PerfumeEffect_Radiantflower: The weight-scaled base effect applies mental break threshold -0.1. At flower weight 1, fixed bonuses activate: injury healing x1.5 and total bleeding x0.8. These fixed bonuses do not grow with higher weight.
LanguageData.VV_PerfumeEffect_Richflower: The weight-scaled base effect grants global work speed +0.15. At flower weight 1, a fixed hunger rate x0.8 bonus activates. This fixed bonus does not grow with higher weight.
LanguageData.VV_PerfumeEffect_Starlitflower: The weight-scaled base effect grants pain shock threshold +0.1. At flower weight 1, fixed bonuses activate: Vacuum Resistance +1 (Odyssey only) and Sight capacity x1.1. These fixed bonuses do not grow with higher weight.
LanguageData.VV_PerfumeEffect_Everflower: The weight-scaled base effect grants psychic sensitivity +0.5. At flower weight 0.7, the weight-scaled Move Speed offset +1.2 also activates. At flower weight 1, a fixed Moving capacity x1.2 bonus activates. This fixed bonus does not grow with higher weight.
